---
title: 'Fretting'
date: '2016-02-26T15:58:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5889168770466086019'
blogger_filename: '/2016/02/fretting.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Resting'
  - 'Recovery'
  - 'In The Mire'
---

<br /><br /><h3>So I'm sitting the bathroom, fretting over the state of our country, and this election cycle.&nbsp;</h3><div><br /></div><div>Then I had this thought:<br /><br />God:<br /><blockquote class="tr_bq">"Why are you fretting about something I have more control over than you?"</blockquote><br />Then just now, I realized... that applies to more than just this election.&nbsp;<div><br /></div><div>That applies to every area of my life.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div><ul><li>Why am I trying to control the events and outcomes at my job?&nbsp;</li></ul></div><div><br /></div><div>I don't have decision making control over that department?<br /><br /><ul><li>Why am I worrying about my finances?&nbsp;</li></ul></div><div><br /></div><div>I've proven TOTALLY incapable of managing my own money, or producing more out of thin air (or schemes).<br /><br /><ul><li>Why AM I fretting about something God has more control over than me?</li></ul><div>Maybe I could just let God be God... just this once.</div><div><br /></div><div>LOL...</div><br />By Darrell</div></div>
